title: Simple The Star Tarot Card Coloring Page

funFacts: Zodiac signs are based on constellations along the sun's path, tracked since ancient Babylonian times.

Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about advanced mechanical structure and shapes while developing fine motor coordination.
